    • getSnapshot

      public String getSnapshot()
      Hash of intermediate change between hash/changelist and what was tested.
Not used if the build is from a commit without modifications.
      string snapshot = 3;
      Specified by:
      getSnapshot in interface CommitIdOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The snapshot.
